qa_pair.question: Initialize the MCP server, then read the server implementation name from the initialize result. What is the exact server name string?
List all tools and identify the shared naming prefix used by every tool name. What is the exact prefix including trailing underscore?
From list_tools, find the tool used for long-tail CLI coverage. What is its exact tool name?
From list_tools metadata, what is the exact value of readOnlyHint for tool agent_mesh_discover_agents? Respond with lowercase true or false.
From list_tools metadata, what is the exact value of destructiveHint for tool agent_mesh_agents_delete? Respond with lowercase true or false.
From list_tools metadata, what is the exact value of idempotentHint for tool agent_mesh_connect_setup? Respond with lowercase true or false.
From list_tools metadata, what is the exact value of openWorldHint for tool agent_mesh_list_local_agents? Respond with lowercase true or false.
Call tool agent_mesh_cli_passthrough with args=["logs"]. The call must fail fast. What exact structuredContent.error.code value is returned?
Call tool agent_mesh_cli_passthrough with args=["mcp","serve"]. What exact structuredContent.error.code value is returned?
From list_tools, inspect the output schema of any tool and identify the field that explicitly indicates authentication requirement on failures. What is the exact field name?
